elements.responsibility: Protect the foundation before planting something new.
elements.poem: The root still lives, but it requires tending.
elements.remedy: Consider committing your work before planting something new.

elements.quote: "Water finds every crack, and carries memory through it."
elements.responsibility: Memory survives because preservation remains faithful.
Truth cannot stand if its structure is compromised.
elements.message: Schema is valid, but migration status could not be confirmed.
elements.poem: The fire burns, but its edges are unclear.
elements.remedy: Ensure the database is accessible and run `npx prisma migrate status`.

elements.quote: "The wind carries the voice of the ancestors."
elements.responsibility: The words of the covenant must remain whole.
elements.message: All sacred documents are present. The covenant is whole.

elements.quote: "A tree without roots cannot shelter those who come after."
elements.responsibility: Every branch depends on what lies beneath.
elements.message: All roots are in place. The tree stands.

elements.quote: "Light makes visible what was always there."
elements.responsibility: Carry the stories forward, without alteration.
elements.message: Heritage records found. The stories are carried forward.

elements.responsibility: The covenant is only as strong as those who keep it.
elements.remedy: Review the failing principles. The community depends on their integrity.

elements.quote: "Legacy is not what we leave behind. It is what we refuse to destroy."
elements.responsibility: Freeze what is sacred before the next season begins.
elements.message: Release v1.0 is frozen and carries its Standard. Legacy is preserved.

elements.quote: "The work of a Steward is to listen without judgment, to record without altering, and to preserve without deleting."
elements.responsibility: Enter this space as a caretaker of the past, working in service to the future.
elements.message: Steward reflection deferred. No interactive terminal detected.
elements.poem: The reflection awaits a human presence.
elements.remedy: Run `npm run calibrate` in your terminal to observe the reflection.

elements.quote: "Remember why this work was begun. Return to it often."
elements.responsibility: Begin each session by being reminded why Impande exists.
elements.message:
To remember faithfully.
To seek truth humbly.
To preserve both for those who come after.

This is the path of continuity. This is the root.
